\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage[english]{babel}
\usepackage[backend=biber,style=authoryear]{biblatex}
\addbibresource{sample.bib}
\begin{document}
\section*{Citation Modes Reference}
This document exercises citation modes using sample bibliography entries.

\subsection*{Parenthetical citations}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Single: \parencite{knuth1984}
  \item Multiple: \parencite{knuth1984,lamport1994}
  \item With prefix/suffix: \parencite[see][p.~42]{knuth1984}
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Narrative citations}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Single: \textcite{knuth1984} says TeX is a typesetting system.
  \item Multiple: \textcite{knuth1984} and \textcite{lamport1994} discuss document preparation.
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Year-only / suppress author}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Year-only: \cite*{knuth1984}
  \item Suppress author: \parencite*{knuth1984}
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Mixed types}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Conference: \parencite{miller2023}
  \item Thesis: \parencite{garcia2022}
  \item Report: \parencite{lee2021}
  \item Web: \parencite{webaccess2024}
\end{itemize}
\end{document}
